description: China's leading IDM (Integrated Device Manufacturer) with full semiconductor value chain: chip design, mask fabrication, wafer manufacturing, packaging and testing. Core focus on power semiconductors (MOSFET #1 in China), smart sensors, and intelligent control. Multiple fabs: 6-inch, 8-inch, and 12-inch. Subsidiary of China Resources Holdings (state-owned conglomerate). Major buyer of wafer probing/dicing equipment for in-house manufacturing. Revenue FY2024: 10.119B CNY.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - probing, dicing equipment for wafer fab and packaging lines
_externalRelationships.notes: Market cap ~600B CNY (~1.26T JPY). Stock price ~53 CNY (Feb 2026). FY2024 revenue 10.119B CNY (first >10B milestone). Ranked #2 in China power semiconductor by Omdia 2025. As an IDM with in-house wafer fab, packaging and testing, requires comprehensive equipment including probers, dicers, and CMP systems. 12-inch high-end fab ramping 2025-2026 for automotive and industrial power devices. China Resources (华润) is a major state-owned enterprise. MOSFET business #1 in China by revenue.

_metadata.dataSource: Investing.com, SSE, company website, Omdia, industry reports, Chinese language sources
